title: Hanging SHOW TABLES for DatabaseDataLake
description:
### Company or project name
### Describe what's wrong
`SHOW TABLES` and `SHOW TABLES FROM hms` do not works, just hang.
Sometimes its not possible to exit client with SIGINT from the hang.
Usage of `DataLakeCatalog` for unhappy paths is broken. It should return in several seconds with trouble description. But it waits for something without any response till client's `SOCKET_TIMEOUT`.
It's all after you've fixed wrong thrift URL leading by non informative errors:
```
DB::Exception: std::invalid_argument: stoi: no conversion. (STD_EXCEPTION)
```
```
DB::Exception: apache::thrift::transport::TTransportException: Could not resolve host for client socket.. (STD_EXCEPTION) (version 25.8.6.11 (official build))
```
```
DB::Exception: apache::thrift::transport::TTransportException: connect() failed: Connection timed out. (STD_EXCEPTION) (version 25.8.6.11 (official build))
```
### Does it reproduce on the most recent release?
Yes
### How to reproduce
```
sudo dpkg -i clickhouse-common-static_25.8.6.11_amd64.deb
mkdir -p _ch/bin && _ch
ln -s /usr/bin/clickhouse ./bin/clickhouse-server
ln -s /usr/bin/clickhouse ./bin/clickhouse-client
./bin/clickhouse-server --daemon
./bin/clickhouse-client
```
```
SET allow_experimental_database_iceberg = 1;
SET allow_experimental_database_hms_catalog = 1;
DROP DATABASE hms;
CREATE DATABASE hms ENGINE = DataLakeCatalog('thrift://some-url-here:9083', 'user', 'password')
SETTINGS catalog_type = 'hive',
storage_endpoint='https://s3-url-here.org/',         -- the same whith  storage_endpoint='s3-url-here.org'
warehouse = 'some',
region = '';
```
```
:) SHOW TABLES FROM hms;
SHOW TABLES FROM hms
Query id: e4493ced-02dd-4ee5-976c-d77594619598
// < -- HANGING HERE
Timeout exceeded while receiving data from server. Waited for 300 seconds, timeout is 300 seconds.
Cancelling query.
// < -- STILL HANGING HERE
```
Sometimes it's not possible to exit from client
```
:) q
Bye.
^C^C^C^C
poc:
CREATE DATABASE hms ENGINE = DataLakeCatalog('thrift://some-url-here:9083', 'user', 'password')
SETTINGS catalog_type = 'hive',
    storage_endpoint='https://s3-url-here.org/',         -- the same whith  storage_endpoint='s3-url-here.org'
    warehouse = 'some',
    region = '';
key_bug_features: SHOW TABLES hangs with DataLakeCatalog usage
bug_features_seed: CREATE DATABASE test_db ENGINE = DataLakeCatalog('thrift://some-url-here:9083', 'user', 'password') SETTINGS catalog_type = 'hive', storage_endpoint='https://s3-url-here.org/', warehouse = 'some', region = '';
CREATE TABLE test_db.test_table (id UInt32, name String, created_at DateTime DEFAULT now(), nullable_col Nullable(Int32)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_db.test_table (id, name, created_at, nullable_col) VALUES (1, 'test_name', now(), NULL);
SELECT * FROM test_db.test_table WHERE nullable_col IS NULL;
